name: Metadata Saver
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Saves debug/trace metadata (timestamp, file path, username, OS info, …) into the .pmeprj project file. For debugging and tracing only — do not share project files containing this data with anonymous users.

name: xTB Optimizer
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Geometry optimization using semiempirical xTB methods (GFN2-xTB, GFN1-xTB) via the tblite package. Runs on a background thread.

name: All-Trans Optimizer
author: HiroYokoyama
description: A geometric tool for straightening alkyl chains.

name: Animated XYZ Giffer
author: HiroYokoyama
description: A player for viewing multi-frame XYZ files and recording GIF animations using PIL.

name: Animated XYZ Player
author: HiroYokoyama
description: A player for viewing multi-frame XYZ files, such as molecular dynamics trajectories.

name: Complex Molecule Untangler
author: HiroYokoyama
description: A Monte Carlo-based tool to resolve steric clashes in complex or roughly drawn molecules.

name: Conformational Search
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Performs conformational sampling and energy minimization.

name: Cube File Viewer
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Visualizes Gaussian Cube files (.cube) containing volumetric data (e.g., orbitals, densities).

name: Gaussian Input Generator
author: HiroYokoyama
description: A comprehensive tool to generate input files for Gaussian quantum chemistry calculations.

name: Hello World
author: HiroYokoyama
description: A simple demonstration plugin.

name: MS Spectrum Simulation
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Simulates the Mass Spectrum for the currently loaded molecule using RDKit descriptors.

name: ORCA Input Generator
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Generates input files for the ORCA quantum chemistry package.

name: PubChem Name Resolver
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Resolves chemical names and identifiers to structures using the PubChem PUG REST API.

name: Python Console
author: HiroYokoyama
description: An interactive Python interpreter embedded in the application. Allows runtime script execution with access to the MainWindow (mw) and current molecule (mol).

name: Atom Colorizer
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Select atoms in the 3D viewer and apply color.

name: Bond Colorizer
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Select bonds by index or atom pair in the 3D viewer and apply color.

name: Dark Mode Theme
author: HiroYokoyama
description: A plugin that automatically applies a dark mode stylesheet to MoleditPy upon loading.

name: Gaussian Input Generator Neo
author: HiroYokoyama
description: High-functionality setting dialog for Gaussian input creation. Supports Link 0, Route, Title, Charge/Mult, and appended data.

name: VDW Radii Overlay
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Visualizes Van der Waals radii as a merged surface overlay using PyVista.

name: Mapped Cube Viewer
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Visualizes a property (e.g. ESP) mapped onto an isosurface (e.g. electron density) from two Cube files.

name: ORCA Input Generator Neo
author: HiroYokoyama
description: High-functionality setting dialog for ORCA input creation. Supports Route, Block Builder, and Validations.

name: ORCA xyz2inp GUI
author: HiroYokoyama
description: GUI for generating ORCA input files from XYZ data with templates.

name: MS Spectrum Simulation Neo
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Simulates the Mass Spectrum for the currently loaded molecule using RDKit descriptors. Includes Gaussian broadening and interactive zoom/pan.

name: Gaussian Freq Analyzer
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Analyzes vibrational frequencies from Gaussian FCHK files. View IR spectrum, animate normal modes, and export GIF animations.

name: ORCA Freq Analyzer
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Analyzes vibrational frequencies from ORCA output files. View IR spectrum, animate normal modes, and export GIF animations.

name: Paste XYZ
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Paste XYZ to view in 3D.

name: Version Checker
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Checks installed plugins against the official repository for updates.

name: Plugin Installer
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Checks for updates, installs new plugins, and allows manual reinstallation.

name: Chat with Molecule
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Chat with Google Gemini about the current molecule. Automatically injects SMILES context.

name: Chat with Molecule Neo (Gemini)
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Chat with Google Gemini about the current molecule. Automatically injects SMILES context. (Neo Version)

name: PubChem Structure Identifier
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Resolve chemical names and fetch molecular properties (Name, Formula, Weight) via PubChem.

name: Chat with Molecule Neo (ChatGPT)
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Chat with OpenAI ChatGPT about the current molecule. Automatically injects SMILES context. (Neo Version)

name: Chat with Molecule Neo (Local)
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Chat with local LLM about the current molecule. Automatically injects SMILES context. (Neo Version)

name: Symmetry Analyzer
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Analyzes molecular symmetry (point group) and symmetrizes structures.

name: Vector Viewer
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Visualizes vectors (e.g. dipole moment) and exports PNGs.

name: MOPAC Input Generator
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Generates input files for MOPAC semi-empirical quantum chemistry calculations.

name: GAMESS Input Generator
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Generates input files for GAMESS (US) quantum chemistry calculations.

name: PySCF Input Generator
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Generates Python scripts for PySCF quantum chemistry calculations.

name: Psi4 Input Generator
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Generates input files for Psi4 quantum chemistry calculations.

name: Molecule Comparator
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Compare multiple molecules in 3D, calculate RMSD, and align them.

name: NWChem Input Generator
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Generates input files for NWChem quantum chemistry calculations.

name: XYZ Editor
author: HiroYokoyama
description: A table-based editor for atom coordinates and symbols, supporting ghost atoms, adding and deleting atoms.

name: Hello World Folder Plugin
author: HiroYokoyama
description: A simple hello world plugin distributed as a zip.

name: PySCF Calculator
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Perform PySCF quantum chemistry calculations directly in MoleditPy. Features: Single Point Energy (RHF/UHF/DFT), Geometry Optimization (GeomeTRIC/Berny), Frequency Analysis, and interactive 3D visualization of Molecular Orbitals (HOMO/LUMO) and Electrostatic Potential (ESP) mapped on Density surfaces.

name: OpenBabel Conversion Tool
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Import various chemical file formats using OpenBabel with multi-molecule support.

name: Paste from ChemDraw
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Paste chemical structures from ChemDraw clipboard data. Developed on ChemDraw version 25.5.

name: Compound Info Report
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Generate a compound info report with properties, adducts, and structure. Useful for organic synthesis experiments.

name: Gaussian MO Analyzer
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Visualizes Molecular Orbitals from Gaussian FCHK files by generating Cube files. The current implementation supports S, P, D, and F shells

name: Gaussian FCHK Loader
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Smart loader for FCHK, FCH, and FCK files. Dispatches to Frequency or MO Analyzer with priority handling.

name: Settings Saver
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Save, load, and manage settings presets in a unified dialog.

name: Structural Updater
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Applies 2D structural changes to 3D conformation without full re-embedding.

name: ORCA Result Analyzer
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Comprehensive analyzer for ORCA output files (.out). Includes Vibrational, MO, TDDFT, and NMR analysis.

name: NMR Predictor (nmrshiftdb2)
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Predict 1H and 13C NMR shifts using nmrshiftdb2. Requires Java Runtime (JRE).

name: Cube File Viewer Advanced
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Advanced 3D visualization for Gaussian Cube files with PBR, SSAO, and other effects.

name: Advanced Rendering
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Fine-grained control over Scene lighting, shadows, post-processing effects (SSAO, Depth Peeling, EDL), and Atom/Bond rendering (PBR, Silhouette).

name: High Resolution Imager
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Take high-resolution screenshots of the 3D view with custom resolution.

name: Blender Export
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Export molecular structures as Blender Python scripts that create 3D visualizations

name: POV-Ray Export
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Export molecular structures as POV-Ray scene files for professional ray-traced rendering

name: Reaction Sketcher
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Adds 2D reaction drawing tools (Arrows, Plus, Text) with a dedicated toolbar.

name: Encrypted Project
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Securely saves molecular data using AES-128 encryption with password protection (.pmeenc file).

name: 3D Molecule on 2D
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Integrated 3D depth cues, rotation, and 3D-aware Mol export.

name: ORCA Input Generator Pro
author: HiroYokoyama
description: High-functionality setting dialog for ORCA input creation. Supports Keywords, Block Builder, and Validations.

name: NICS Placer
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Detect rings and place Bq ghost atoms at NICS(0)/NICS(1) probe positions. Compatible with ORCA Input Generator Pro via the custom_symbol property.

name: Molibrary Browser
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Standalone intranet chemistry structure and protocol database. Connects MoleditPy to a local Molibrary server for structure searching and importing.

name: CIF Viewer
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Visualization-only CIF crystal structure viewer with unit-cell and supercell rendering for MoleditPy.

name: Rotation Giffer
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Creates a rotating GIF around global or view axes by orbiting the camera.

name: Strain Homodesmotic Reaction Generator
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Detect strain-molecule bonding environments and build a draft homodesmotic reaction balance.

name: Dummy Atom Mode
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Adds a dummy atom (*) mode to the 2D editor and registers a toolbar action to place dummy atoms.

name: DECIMER Image Importer
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Import chemical structures from PNG/JPG/JPEG images using the DECIMER deep learning model (SMILES prediction from chemical structure drawings).

name: Blender Export Pro
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Stylized/deformed Blender export: cartoon, low-poly, glass, clay and custom styles with a live 3D preview and one-click bpy script generation.

name: PMEFF Plugin
author: HiroYokoyama
description: PMEFF (Python Molecular Editor Force Field) — a self-contained universal force field covering the entire periodic table (Z=1..118). Adds a geometry optimizer, a single-point energy tool with per-term decomposition, and a vibrational minimum check. No external QM binary required.

name: MCP Server
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Expose MoleditPy via Model Context Protocol (MCP) for AI assistant integration (Claude Desktop, etc.).

name: Gaussian Input Generator Pro
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Advanced Gaussian Input Generator with Preview and Presets.

name: Step Optimizer
author: HiroYokoyama
description: Interactive step-by-step force-field optimization with live 3D animation.

name: Bond Editor
author: HiroYokoyama
description: A table-based bond editor: add/delete bonds, change bond order, and set bond lengths by moving one side of the bond. In the 3D view pick a mode to select a bond by clicking it, or create a bond by clicking two atoms.

name: Charge Editor
author: HiroYokoyama
description: A table-based editor for per-atom formal charge and radical electrons. Click atoms in the 3D view to select them, and read off the total charge and spin multiplicity for DFT input preparation.
